members.name: GetStretchMargin
members.summary: Returns the stretch margin with the specified index. See [member stretch_margin_bottom] and related properties.

members.name: SetStretchMargin
members.signature: public void SetStretchMargin(int margin, int value)
members.summary: Sets the stretch margin with the specified index. See [member stretch_margin_bottom] and related properties.

members.name: FillMode
members.summary: The fill direction. See [enum FillMode] for possible values.

members.name: NinePatchStretch
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], Godot treats the bar's textures like in [NinePatchRect]. Use the [code]stretch_margin_*[/code] properties like [member stretch_margin_bottom] to set up the nine patch's 3×3 grid. When using a radial [member fill_mode], this setting will only enable stretching for [member texture_progress], while [member texture_under] and [member texture_over] will be treated like in [NinePatchRect].

members.name: RadialCenterOffset
members.summary: Offsets [member texture_progress] if [member fill_mode] is [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE], [constant FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE], or [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE]. [b]Note:[/b] The effective radial center always stays within the [member texture_progress] bounds. If you need to move it outside the texture's bounds, modify the [member texture_progress] to contain additional empty space where needed.

members.name: RadialFillDegrees
members.summary: Upper limit for the fill of [member texture_progress] if [member fill_mode] is [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE], [constant FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE], or [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE]. When the node's [code]value[/code] is equal to its [code]max_value[/code], the texture fills up to this angle. See [member Range.value], [member Range.max_value].

members.name: RadialInitialAngle
members.summary: Starting angle for the fill of [member texture_progress] if [member fill_mode] is [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE], [constant FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE], or [constant FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE]. When the node's [code]value[/code] is equal to its [code]min_value[/code], the texture doesn't show up at all. When the [code]value[/code] increases, the texture fills and tends towards [member radial_fill_degrees]. [b]Note:[/b] [member radial_initial_angle] is wrapped between [code]0[/code] and [code]360[/code] degrees (inclusive).

members.name: StretchMarginBottom
members.summary: The height of the 9-patch's bottom row. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's bottom corners and side will have a height of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders. Only effective if [member nine_patch_stretch] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: StretchMarginLeft
members.summary: The width of the 9-patch's left column. Only effective if [member nine_patch_stretch] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: StretchMarginRight
members.summary: The width of the 9-patch's right column. Only effective if [member nine_patch_stretch] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: StretchMarginTop
members.summary: The height of the 9-patch's top row. Only effective if [member nine_patch_stretch] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: TextureOver
members.summary: [Texture2D] that draws over the progress bar. Use it to add highlights or an upper-frame that hides part of [member texture_progress].

members.name: TextureProgress
members.summary: [Texture2D] that clips based on the node's [code]value[/code] and [member fill_mode]. As [code]value[/code] increased, the texture fills up. It shows entirely when [code]value[/code] reaches [code]max_value[/code]. It doesn't show at all if [code]value[/code] is equal to [code]min_value[/code]. The [code]value[/code] property comes from [Range]. See [member Range.value], [member Range.min_value], [member Range.max_value].

members.name: TextureProgressOffset
members.summary: The offset of [member texture_progress]. Useful for [member texture_over] and [member texture_under] with fancy borders, to avoid transparent margins in your progress texture.

members.name: TextureUnder
members.summary: [Texture2D] that draws under the progress bar. The bar's background.

members.name: TintOver
members.summary: Multiplies the color of the bar's [member texture_over] texture. The effect is similar to [member CanvasItem.modulate], except it only affects this specific texture instead of the entire node.

members.name: TintProgress
members.summary: Multiplies the color of the bar's [member texture_progress] texture.

members.name: TintUnder
members.summary: Multiplies the color of the bar's [member texture_under] texture.

values.name: FILL_BILINEAR_LEFT_AND_RIGHT
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from the center, expanding both towards the left and the right.

values.name: FILL_BILINEAR_TOP_AND_BOTTOM
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from the center, expanding both towards the top and the bottom.

values.name: FILL_BOTTOM_TO_TOP
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from bottom to top.

values.name: FILL_CLOCKWISE
values.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills clockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.

values.name: FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
values.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills radially from the center, expanding both clockwise and counterclockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.

values.name: FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
values.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills counterclockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.

values.name: FILL_LEFT_TO_RIGHT
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from left to right.

values.name: FILL_RIGHT_TO_LEFT
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from right to left.

values.name: FILL_TOP_TO_BOTTOM
values.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from top to bottom.

constants.name: FILL_LEFT_TO_RIGHT
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from left to right.

constants.name: FILL_RIGHT_TO_LEFT
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from right to left.

constants.name: FILL_TOP_TO_BOTTOM
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from top to bottom.

constants.name: FILL_BOTTOM_TO_TOP
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from bottom to top.

constants.name: FILL_CLOCKWISE
constants.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills clockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.

constants.name: FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
constants.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills counterclockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.

constants.name: FILL_BILINEAR_LEFT_AND_RIGHT
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from the center, expanding both towards the left and the right.

constants.name: FILL_BILINEAR_TOP_AND_BOTTOM
constants.summary: The [member texture_progress] fills from the center, expanding both towards the top and the bottom.

constants.name: FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
constants.summary: Turns the node into a radial bar. The [member texture_progress] fills radially from the center, expanding both clockwise and counterclockwise. See [member radial_center_offset], [member radial_initial_angle] and [member radial_fill_degrees] to control the way the bar fills up.
